title: Plugin SDK Conformance Tests
steps: Create valid and invalid plugin manifest fixtures under fixtures/plugins.
Add tests for manifest validation, inspect output, invalid permission denial, ObjectBatch dry-run, deterministic digest, and CLI validate/inspect/test.
Include Windows path normalization and CRLF fixture coverage where practical.
convergence_criteria: Conformance tests fail on invalid manifest fixtures and pass on valid fixtures.
CLI integration tests cover validate, inspect, and test.
ObjectBatch dry-run tests prove no DB mutation.
Permission denial tests are explicit and sanitized.

result.summary: Fixture-backed conformance tests cover valid and invalid manifests, ObjectBatch dry-run, host checks, and CLI plugin commands.
result.tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk-tests passed; cargo test --workspace passed
